title: model-check test (chopAll) fails: size mismatch between tree and oracle
description:
Recovered from pre-migration data loss (was intervaltree-g44, in_progress before April 1). Original contents not preserved in full — only title known for certain.

When running the model-check test against chopAll, size between the IntervalTree instance and the test oracle diverges. Indicates a bug in chopAll's size tracking (likely tied to the 'maintain size as running counter' optimization).

Repro: run model check test suite.

To investigate: check recent commits touching chopAll and the size-counter refactor — relevant PRs/commits 'fix: data drop in searchByLengthStartingAt, dead branches', 'fix: chopAll _size mismatch when dirty tree produces duplicate fragments'. Those commits may have addressed the issue, in which case close this bead after verifying.
close_reason: Bug no longer reproduces. npm run model-check passes. Verified 2026-04-14 before slinging.
